items.title: Injury gave new meaning to Fred Warner's philosophy of treating every game like his last
items.summary: San Francisco linebacker Fred Warner is fully cleared and ready to go after a gruesome injury that ended his 2025 season.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Afghanistan to host India for T20I series in Delhi
items.summary: This will be the first time a team will host India on Indian soil
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Leeds in talks to sign Man City keeper Trafford
items.summary: Leeds United are in discussions with Manchester City to sign goalkeeper James Trafford.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
